name: Pineapple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash ripe banana with a fork until you have 1/4 cup.
2. In a bowl, beat together the mashed banana, pineapple juice concentrate, vegetable oil, large egg, and milk until creamy.
3. Add the flour, baking soda, coconut, and orange rind to the mixture. Beat well to combine all ingredients evenly.
4. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the dough onto lightly oiled baking sheets.
5. Sprinkle each portion with grated orange rind.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 minutes, or until the edges are just brown and the cookies feel firm when touched.
7. Allow to cool on wire racks.
